system.description: The caster creates a quasi-real illusion, one possessed of some substance and reality, that mimics one of the following spells: cloudkill, cone of cold, fireball, ice storm, lightning bolt, magic missile, stinking cloud, wall of fire, wall of force, wall of ice, wall of iron, wall of stone, or web. The mimicked spell has its full normal effect, range, duration, saving throw allowances, SR, and so on, unless the targeted creature(s) makes an Int saving throw. A successful saving throw reduces the mimicked spell to 40% of its normal damage, effect and strength.
